materialChanges: Clarified the random-error glossary definition so sampling variation is a narrower example rather than an alias and explicitly included unpredictable measurement variation.
Added a learner-visible analysis-set definition at the retention stage and narrowed the reviewed glossary scene mappings to scenes containing the corresponding term or alias.
Updated ATTRIBUTION.md to describe the committed advisory reviews and fresh finalization while preserving draft, pending-review, and non-publication boundaries.

reviewDispositions.rationale: glossary.json no longer treats sampling variation as a synonym for all random error; the definition now identifies sampling variation and unpredictable measurement variation as examples, and the alias list is empty.

The finding confirms the fictional seedling arithmetic and boundary. The final lesson retains 80% versus 70% among survivors, 72% versus 49% for the prespecified assigned-denominator outcome, the 10- versus 23-percentage-point contrasts, and the unresolved observer component.

The finding affirms the conditions-and-exceptions boundary for misclassification direction. The final claim, explanation, practice, and assessment still reject a universal toward-the-null shortcut and require direction evidence.

The finding confirms that the pipeline is a timing heuristic rather than mutually exclusive taxonomy. The final prose and complete text alternative retain the overlap and filter-timing qualifications.
The affirmative first-read finding identifies no defect. The concrete seedling opening, ordinary-language account of bias, scope, objectives, diagnostic, and recovery route are preserved.
The affirmative coherence finding identifies no defect. The six-stage pipeline, overlapping-category boundaries, reporting/publication distinction, and direction cautions are preserved.
The affirmative worked-example finding identifies no defect. The task representation, plan, calculations, checks, interpretation, uncertainty, and self-explanation prompt remain unchanged.

glossary.json now maps analysis set, misclassification, differential misclassification, target population/target cases, and transportability only to learner-facing scenes where those terms or aliases occur. content/02-follow-the-evidence-pipeline.md now explicitly defines analysis set at the retention stage so that retained glossary entry has a visible cue.

evidenceChecked: Compared the six ordered lesson.json scenes with all six Markdown sources; each source has exactly one level-one heading, a logical heading hierarchy, and source order that supplies the reading and focus order.

Checked the evidence-pipeline diagram's alt text and long description against its nodes and edges and against the complete numbered and prose equivalent in the same scene; no information depends only on color, position, pointer movement, sound, motion, or timing.

Checked all learner operations and assessment routes: prompts precede feedback, every task is text-completable, the mastery assessment is untimed and retakeable, and no drag-only, hover-only, audio-only, physical-only, or personal-data route is required.

Checked source-level reflow and keyboard assumptions: the pack contains semantic Markdown and declarative JSON with no fixed dimensions, raw HTML, inline styles, custom components, remote embeds, or interaction code.

Checked all nine references for exact use records, facts-only-original-expression rights bases and evidence, displayed licence fields, dated agent-access checks, terms routes, and checked-no-agent-restriction-found status; no source is marked human-only.

Checked lesson.json and ATTRIBUTION.md for CC BY 4.0 licensing, accountable and material-agent disclosure, original-synthesis statements, source-use boundaries, and an empty thirdPartyAssets list; the original local diagram is the only visual asset and no licence exception is declared.

Checked privacy, safety, and security boundaries: cases are labelled fictional, the lesson disclaims clinical or agricultural recommendation and diagnostic use, no identifiable or personal data are present, and no executable code, raw HTML, JavaScript, unsafe URL scheme, remote media, or active diagram content was found.

Checked the finalizer run ID against all lesson author and review run IDs and found no reuse; this adjudication records the accountable principal, required runtime-stamped agent fields, fresh run ID, and material-instructions digest.
limitations: No live browser, keyboard-only, screen-reader, 200% zoom/reflow, reduced-motion, print, or non-web export test was run; the audit establishes source-level equivalence, while renderer behavior remains unobserved.

The operator prohibited npm and reading site/, so strict source preflight, repository validation, and direct comparison with the public adjudication schema were not run in this finalizer pass; JSON syntax and pack-local invariants were checked manually.

The finalizer did not reopen external sources or recheck current source terms; the rights judgment is limited to the complete dated records in references.json, ATTRIBUTION.md, and the academic review's reported direct source checks.
The COMMENTED GitHub transports and their non-dismissed equivalence were supplied by the operator and were not independently queried in this run.

rationale: The two eligible standard-lesson advisory artifacts match PREM-SCI-008 version 0.1.0 and candidate commit 9df98b58e534225725314047d88538235159bd88, supply one academic and one learning-design input, record two approving verdicts, and declare distinct review runs and providers. Their shared accountable principal is permitted during the founding stage and does not constitute verified independence. All eight indexed findings are disposed: two minor findings were incorporated in one coherent post-review revision and six affirmative notes required no change. The final lesson preserves the reviewed academic and assessment logic, and the finalizer's source-level accessibility-and-rights audit found complete semantic and nonvisual routes, original facts-only synthesis, no third-party assets, no human-only sources, and no unresolved safety, privacy, security, provenance, or licensing blocker. The audit and quorum conclusions are bounded by the stated validation, renderer, external-source, and GitHub-transport limitations. On the lesson evidence, the decision is merge subject to the listed operator conditions; this value is not permission to merge or publish.
conditions: The operator must commit the finalized lesson content after the reviewed candidate, substitute that exact 40-character SHA for PENDING-FINAL-COMMIT, and make no teaching-content change after the recorded final commit.

The operator must run the strict source preflight and repository validation required by the project and resolve any failure before merge; any substantive repair requires a new final-content SHA and updated adjudication record.

The operator must confirm that both cited COMMENTED GitHub review transports remain equivalent and non-dismissed, then reserve publication status, source-confidence, and retained claim review-status transitions to the maintainer's permitted post-finalization step.
